calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Ccp 664.6 Dismissal, And Enter Judgment Against Defendant
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s unopposed Motion to Set Aside CCP 664.6 Dismissal, and Enter Judgment Against Defendant is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and consistent with the parties' agreement and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6, judgment shall be entered as such: Plaintiff Capital One, N.A. shall recover shall recover $11,09844 ($11,632.44 less $534)14,149.09 in principal, and $597.00 in costs, for a total of $11,695.44.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order containing the above text verbatim.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed judgment conforming to the requirements in the Code of Civil Procedure and California Rules of Court, ideally on the appropriate Judicial Council form.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
